name: Blizzard Entertainment
aka: World of Warcraft - Starcraft - Heroes of the Storm - Hearthstone - Diablo - Overwatch - Battle.net
notes:
Creator and publisher of popular online games. Current game titles:: World of Warcraft - Starcraft - Heroes of the Storm - Hearthstone - Diablo - Overwatch.

Blizzard maintains an open peering policy, however please note due to the regional and latency sensitive nature of our content we do perform selective route advertisements based on regional player connectivity and performance. If you have any questions please do not hesitate to contact us via peering@blizzard.com.
